title: stachys milanii
intro: Stachys milanii, also known as the 'Hedgent' or 'Betonica', is a perennial plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The leaves of the Stachys milanii plant are rich in betonicine and other compounds that have been shown to have health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Stachys milanii is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it has also been used in traditional herbal remedies for its purported health benefits.
